app.about.desc: A local Markdown notebook application for offline writing, editing, and document management.
app.about.title: {name} · Version {version}
app.about.update.checkFailed: Unable to check for updates right now.
app.update.prompt.title: Update available
app.update.prompt.message: Version {version} is available on GitHub. Download now?
app.alert.title: Notice
app.closeWindow.message: You have unsaved changes. Closing will discard unsaved content. Close anyway?
app.closeWindow.title: Close window
app.unsaved.title: Unsaved changes
app.unsaved.quitMessage: You have unsaved changes. Save before quitting?
app.unsaved.quitMessageMany: {count} documents have unsaved changes. Save all before quitting?
app.confirm.closeTabDirty: This tab has unsaved changes. Close anyway?
app.confirm.closeTabsDirty: Some tabs being closed have unsaved changes. Continue?
app.confirm.title: Confirm
app.confirm.deleteEntry: Delete this item? This cannot be undone.
app.confirm.deleteFile: Delete the current file? This cannot be undone.
app.confirm.revertFile: Discard unsaved changes and reload from disk?
app.confirm.externalFileChangedDirty: This file was changed on disk while you have unsaved edits. Discard local changes and reload?
app.confirm.switchWorkspaceDirty: You have unsaved changes. Switching workspace will discard them (including untitled tabs). Continue?
app.dialog.noteNewHint: Enter a document name. Leave blank to use the default.
app.ext.emojiPanelHint: Emoji: use the system emoji panel (macOS Ctrl+Cmd+Space / Windows Win+.).
app.ext.eolCrlfNote: Line endings are normalized to LF on save; use external tools for CRLF if needed.
app.ext.eolLfNote: This note uses LF line endings.
app.ext.imageBatchPlaceholder: Batch image upload/move will use a future asset service (placeholder).
app.ext.imageZoomPlaceholder: Image zoom: add HTML attributes in Markdown or use WYSIWYG image tools (placeholder).
app.ext.indentFirstNeedSource: Indent first line: use the menu in Markdown source mode.
app.ext.linkNotFoundInSelection: No Markdown link found in the selection.
app.ext.mergeWindowsHint: Merge windows: close extra windows manually (multi-window merge later).
app.ext.noMonitor: Could not get the current display.
app.ext.showBrNote: Visible line breaks: CodeMirror plugin not wired yet.
app.ext.tileDesktopOnly: Tile fullscreen requires the desktop app.
app.ext.windowLayoutDesktopOnly: Window layout needs the desktop app.
app.focusMode.title: Focus mode (Cmd/Ctrl+Option+F)
app.menu.noActiveDocForIntro: Select a document in the file list first.
app.menu.noSavedFileToReveal: No saved file on disk to reveal.
app.menu.findUnavailable: Built-in find is unavailable in current mode. Use Command/Ctrl+F.
app.menu.emptyDocIntro: No summary content found for this document.
app.menu.pickFileInWorkspace: Pick a file inside the current workspace.
app.menu.recentDirUnavailable: Could not locate the folder for the recent file.
app.menu.unnamedTabCloseHint: Close untitled tabs with × on the tab bar.
app.menu.unnamedTabNotOnDisk: Untitled tab is not saved to disk yet.
app.paste.imageNeedSavedDoc: Open a saved Markdown file before pasting images.
app.rename.hint: Enter a new name (include extension for files)
app.search.placeholder: Global search ({globalSearch}) · Command Palette {commandPalette} · Current doc {findInDoc}
app.sidebar.empty.openFolder: Open a notes folder to browse files, or use + below or File → New to start writing.
app.sidebar.empty.openNoteOutline: Open a note to see the outline.
app.sidebar.switchToFilesFirst: Switch back to file list first
app.sidebar.toggleOutline: Show file list in sidebar / outline only
app.sidebar.toggleOutlineFiles: Show the file list in the sidebar
app.status.bufferNoDiskVersion: Untitled tab has no saved version on disk.
app.status.editorCommandNotReady: Editor not ready — click in the document first, then try again.
app.status.exportNeedDesktop: Exporting to a file requires the desktop app.
app.status.pickFolder: Choose a notes folder, or use File → New to start ({app}).
app.status.revealDesktopOnly: Reveal in file manager requires the desktop app.
app.status.revealFolderDesktopOnly: Reveal in folder requires the desktop app.
app.status.noteTooLarge: Note exceeds the 20MB size limit and cannot be opened in the editor
app.status.editorBinding: Editor is not bound to the active document yet
app.status.saveNothingHint: Nothing to save yet. Use File → New to start.
app.status.saveOutsideWorkspace: Save inside the current workspace folder.
app.status.undoUnavailable: Nothing to undo in the current mode.
app.status.redoUnavailable: Nothing to redo in the current mode.
app.status.replaceSourceOnly: Switch to source mode (⌘/Ctrl+/) to replace text.
app.status.saveConflict: Save failed: the file was modified on disk. Reload or save elsewhere first.
app.status.externalFileChangedInactive: "{path}" changed on disk while inactive; local unsaved edits remain.
app.status.workspaceRestoreFailed: Last workspace is unavailable; pick a folder again.
app.tabs.externalDiskHint: File changed on disk; local unsaved edits remain
app.saveConflict.title: Save conflict
app.saveConflict.message: "{path}" was modified on disk. Choose which version to keep:
app.saveConflict.truncated: Showing the first 200 differing lines only. Open the file after resolving to see the full content.
app.toolbar.modeToVisual: Switch to WYSIWYG — type and preview inline (⌘/)
app.toolbar.themePresetBrowser: Color preset (browser preview; desktop: Theme menu)
app.toolbar.themePresetTitle: Browser preview: color preset. Use the Theme menu in the desktop app.
editor.status.serializeError: Could not serialize the document to Markdown ({detail}). Kept the last good sync.
editor.status.visualOpUnsupported: This action is not supported in WYSIWYG mode right now.
prefs.language.label: Language
prefs.language.restartRequired: Language change will take effect after restart.
prefs.nav.label: Settings categories
prefs.restart.webHint: Restart the app manually to apply changes (browser preview cannot relaunch).
prefs.section.appearance.lead: Three areas: built-in app theme, Obsidian-style external CSS (editor UI only), and UI snippets.
prefs.section.export.lead: Paper presets, table of contents, and pagination for HTML/PDF/PNG; manage export-only CSS below.
prefs.section.editor.lead: Asset storage, editor behavior, typography, and autosave.
prefs.section.general.lead: Workspace and startup options will appear here.
prefs.section.language.intro: Choose the display language for menus and the interface. Restart required for some changes.
prefs.section.shortcuts.lead: View and customize global keyboard shortcuts. Click a shortcut field, then press a new key combination. Press Esc to cancel.
prefs.title: Preferences
settings.assets.absolutePath.description: New imports will be copied into this fixed folder.
settings.assets.absolutePath.label: Absolute Storage Location
settings.assets.description: Manage how imported files are stored and referenced.
settings.assets.folderTemplate.label: Folder Template
settings.assets.storageMode.absolute.des: Store all imports in one folder.
settings.assets.storageMode.description: Choose how imported files are stored.
settings.assets.storageMode.label: Storage Mode
settings.assets.title: Assets
settings.updates.title: Updates
settings.updates.description: Check GitHub for new stable releases.
settings.updates.autoCheck.label: Check for updates automatically
settings.updates.autoCheck.description: Check for new versions when the app starts.
settings.editor.description: Configure editing behavior and writing preferences.
settings.editor.fontFamily.description: Applies only to document visual mode and source mode (does not affect sidebar or menus).
settings.editor.fontFamily.label: Document Font Family
settings.editor.fontFamily.placeholder: e.g. Inter, PingFang SC, JetBrains Mono
settings.editor.fontSize.description: Applies to body text, headings, and source mode in px (1–60). Leave empty for the default (~17px). Changes apply immediately.
settings.editor.fontSize.label: Document Font Size
settings.editor.title: Editor
settings.editor.autosaveEnabled.label: Auto-save
settings.editor.autosaveEnabled.descript: Periodically write unsaved changes to disk.
settings.editor.autosaveIntervalSec.desc: 30–600 seconds; applies to workspace notes only.
settings.editor.autosaveScope.label: Auto-save scope
settings.editor.autosaveScope.descriptio: Current tab only, or all unsaved workspace documents.
settings.file.dropHint: Drop a JSON theme here, or import one from disk.
settings.language.description: Choose the display language used by the app.
settings.language.language.description: Choose the display language used by the app.
settings.language.language.label: Language
settings.language.title: Language
settings.export.description: Control paper size, content width, table of contents behavior, and pagination strategy for exports.
settings.export.pageBreakMode.avoidBlock: Keep code blocks, tables, images, and callouts together
settings.export.pageBreakMode.descriptio: Choose how aggressively export tries to avoid awkward page breaks.
settings.export.pageBreakMode.flow: Allow content to flow across page breaks
settings.export.pageBreakMode.label: Pagination strategy
settings.export.preset.description: Choose the default paper size, margins, and content width for HTML/PDF/PNG exports.
settings.export.preset.label: Export preset
settings.export.title: Export
settings.export.tocMode.always: Always insert a table of contents
settings.export.tocMode.description: Choose whether exports honor `[toc]`, always inject a TOC, or suppress it.
settings.export.tocMode.label: Table of contents
settings.theme.active.description: Switch built-in app colors; does not load Obsidian .css files.
settings.theme.active.label: Built-in theme
settings.theme.builtin.description: CrossPlatNote UI colors. Can be combined with Obsidian CSS below.
settings.theme.builtin.title: Built-in theme
settings.theme.cssCompatMode.description: How to parse .css files in the Theme folder (editor UI only).
settings.theme.cssCompatMode.label: CSS Theme Compatibility
settings.theme.cssFile.description: Pick a .css from Theme/ to style the editor UI (not export-only CSS).
settings.theme.cssFile.folderDescription: Place or edit .css files in Theme/, then rescan and select from the dropdown above.
settings.theme.cssFile.inactiveMessage: No external CSS theme is active.
settings.theme.cssFile.label: External CSS Theme
settings.theme.cssFile.missingDescriptio: The saved CSS file is missing from Theme/*.css.
settings.theme.cssFile.noneDescription: Use only the built-in or JSON theme tokens.
settings.theme.cssSnippets.manageDescrip: .css files in Theme/snippets/ stack on the editor UI (can combine with external theme above).
settings.theme.cssSnippets.sectionDescri: Extra rules for the editor UI only; does not affect export-only CSS.
settings.theme.exportCss.manageDescripti: .css in Theme/export/ applies only to HTML/PDF/PNG output, not the editor.
settings.theme.exportCss.sectionDescript: Styles for exported files only; paper and TOC options are in the section above.
settings.theme.exportCss.emptyCatalog: No export styles found in Theme/export/*.css.
settings.theme.customThemeFile.descripti: JSON token file overrides built-in colors (separate from Obsidian .css).
settings.theme.customThemeFile.invalid: The selected file is not a valid JSON theme.
settings.theme.customThemeFile.label: Custom Theme File
settings.theme.description: Configure app appearance: built-in theme, Obsidian CSS, and UI snippets.
settings.theme.obsidianCss.description: Load Obsidian community .css themes; affects only what you see in the editor.
settings.theme.obsidianCss.title: Obsidian external CSS
settings.theme.title: Theme
